findings.description: Two email hyperlinks present in the PDF (DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov) lost their href attributes in the HTML and appear as plain text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows 'DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov' as a clickable hyperlink in two places (application instructions and bottom contact). In HTML, the first instance is bare text inside a <li> and the second is wrapped only in <u> with no <a href>.
